faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Bay Ridge, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Bay Ridge homes commonly experience pavement ants, carpenter ants, and odorous house ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning in the area's older wood-frame homes and can cause structural damage if left untreated. Our technicians identify the specific species and apply targeted treatments for complete elimination.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide ant control service in Bay Ridge?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day ant control services throughout Bay Ridge, including the 11209 zip code. Most treatments take 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation and the size of your property. We serve all areas from Shore Road to Fort Hamilton Parkway.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 ant control service include?
faqs.answer: Our ant control service includes a thorough inspection, identification of entry points and nesting sites, interior and exterior treatment, and a follow-up visit to ensure complete elimination. The price varies based on property size, infestation severity, and treatment method. We provide free estimates for all Bay Ridge properties.

faqs.question: Are your ant control treatments safe for children and pets in Bay Ridge homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals.
